acceptance_criteria: Each incoming inquiry email is classified as one of: prospect|press|spam|other.
No PII in logs — only the inquiry-id, label, and confidence.
Failed classifications fall back to "other" without blocking the inbox.

business_requirements.title: Auto-tag incoming inquiry emails
business_requirements.description: Run a Claude classifier over each new email arriving at hello@prakash-tiwari.com. Label each email so the operator inbox view can group by category. The classifier returns {label, confidence} per email; the operator sees the label as a badge in the inbox UI.
